title: Tutel: Adaptive Mixture-of-Experts at Scale
key_contribution: Tutel: A system that accelerates Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models

context.moe_popularity: Popular approach for scaling DNNs to trillion-plus parameters
context.previous_limitations: Existing MoE frameworks are mostly based on static runtime execution

effectiveness.comparison: Superior accuracy compared to dense counterpart

technical_challenges.dynamic_workload: Workload of experts varies based on input data and gating function
technical_challenges.parallelism_optimization: Optimal parallelism differs depending on dynamic workload
technical_challenges.redistribution_overhead: Dynamic adjustment of parallelism typically incurs large redistribution overhead
